svg.title: VS Code Extension Architecture: Cline + GSD v1.5 + ITAR-compliant
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing the GSD v1.5 hybrid configuration: VS Code UI layer, GSD v1 skills layer, GSD v1.5 hooks bridge layer, Cline core, and approved API endpoint. All data flows within the approved boundary.
svg.text: Approved ITAR/EAR boundary (machine · network · API key)
VS Code UI layer
Native extension surfaces — now includes GSD Orchestrator + Auto Mode toggle

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GSD Planning Panel sidebar webview')
sendPrompt('How does the GSD status bar show phase, step, and auto mode?')
sendPrompt('What GSD commands are registered in the VS Code command palette?')
sendPrompt('How does GsdOrchestrator.ts implement auto-advance by watching STATE.md?')
sendPrompt('What does the GSD Settings UI expose for mode and auto-advance configuration?')
sendPrompt('How does the .planning/ file watcher feed the Planning Panel and GsdOrchestrator?')
sendPrompt('What notifications does the extension show for GSD phase transitions?')
sendPrompt('How is the extension packaged and distributed internally as a VSIX?')

svg.text: GSD v1 workflow layer — vendored · no egress · installed from .clinerules
Discuss → Plan → Execute → Verify · 86 skills total, --minimal = 6 core skills bundled in VSIX

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the GSD discuss phase in detail')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the GSD plan phase and how it creates atomic XML task plans')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the GSD execute phase and wave-parallel subagents')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the GSD verify phase, UAT and auto-debug')
sendPrompt('What GSD state files live in .planning/ and what does each contain?')

svg.text: NEW
GSD v1.5 hooks bridge — .clinerules/hooks/ · programmatic layer · zero egress
Cline lifecycle hooks that give v1 programmatic context control without a separate CLI or binary

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the PreCompact hook and how it preserves GSD state across context compaction')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the UserPromptSubmit hook and how it detects GSD commands and injects plan files')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the PostToolUse hook and how it detects stuck read loops')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the TaskStart hook and how it injects GSD phase context at task initialization')

svg.text: Cline core (forked · Apache 2.0)
Modified for single-endpoint, no telemetry, no marketplace, no auto-update · hooks system preserved

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Clines agentic loop work — plan, act, verify?')
sendPrompt('What file and terminal tools does Cline use?')
sendPrompt('How does Clines context manager work with the PreCompact hook?')
sendPrompt('What MCP servers are whitelisted in the fork and how is the marketplace disabled?')
sendPrompt('What telemetry and external calls need to be stripped from the Cline fork?')
sendPrompt('How is the API endpoint locked in the fork to prevent provider switching?')
sendPrompt('How are dependencies pinned and what goes into the SBOM for compliance?')

svg.text: Government-approved LLM endpoint
ITAR-eligible provider · US sovereign · screened US persons · CONUS data residency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What makes AWS GovCloud Bedrock ITAR eligible for this use case?')
sendPrompt('What makes Azure Government OpenAI ITAR eligible?')
sendPrompt('What other ITAR-eligible LLM endpoint options exist?')

svg.text: Layer legend
VS Code UI
GSD v1 workflow
GSD v1.5 hooks ← NEW
Cline core (forked)
Gov-approved API endpoint
Stripped / locked
GSD v1.5 adds four hooks inside .clinerules/hooks/ + GsdOrchestrator.ts in the Cline fork
PreCompact · UserPromptSubmit · PostToolUse · TaskStart — zero egress · no new dependencies
Click any component to explore it further
